message:
test(tui): add 22 unit tests and fix 10 duplicate test names (bd-xzt.4.1)

Add sections §25–§35 to test_unit_coverage.rs covering palette_reset,
BallastVolume edge cases, RateHistory edge cases, hint verbosity,
preference persistence, screen key noop, overlay key routing, palette
search edges, timeline follow mode, human_bytes terabyte range, and
telemetry candidates sort/cursor clamping. Fix 10 duplicate test
function names in update.rs from concurrent agent changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
